TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-23-2015 IN DEPT. 318 FOR HEARING ON DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO TAX PLAINTIFFS COSTS - GRANTED. PARTIES SUBMIT TO THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING ISSUED FRIDAY, NOVEMBER 20TH WHICH READS IN PERTINENT PART AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS CROSSROADS TRADING COMPANY, INC. AND CTC RE III, LLC'S MOTION TO TAX PLAINTIFFS' COSTS IS GRANTED. BY THEIR SEPTEMBER 30, 2015 MEMORANDUM OF COSTS, PLAINTIFFS SOUGHT RECOVERY OF $33,6262.00 IN COSTS. THOSE COSTS INCLUDED $19,833 IN "OTHER" COSTS. OF THAT AMOUNT, $14,894.07 IS "TRIAL TRANSCRIPT COSTS," WHICH REPRESENTS PLAINTIFFS' SHARE OF THE COST FOR DAILY TRANSCRIPTS DURING TRIAL. MOVING DEFENDANTS SEEK TO TAX COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $14,894.07 ON THE GROUNDS THAT TRIAL TRANSCRIPT COSTS ARE NOT RECOVERABLE. NO DEFENDANT HAS CHALLENGED OR CONTESTED ANY OTHER COSTS SOUGHT BY PLAINTIFFS. IN RESPONSE TO THE MOTION, PLAINTIFFS WITHDREW THEIR REQUEST FOR $14,894.07 IN TRIAL TRANSCRIPTS. THUS, THE COURT GRANTS MOVING DEFENDANTS' MOTION. THE COURT TAXES $14,894.07 OF THE COSTS AND AWARDS PLAINTIFFS $18,642 AS RECOVERABLE COSTS. MOVING DEFENDANTS SHALL SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THE COURT'S RULING. NO APPEARANCE. NOT REPORTED. (D318).
